description: Start with a point at (0,0,0). At each iteration, add a new point by increasing one of the coordinates of the current point by 1, choosing the option that gives the least maximum number of points on a line through the new point. In case of ties, compare the number of points on the line with the next largest number of points, etc. If there is still a tie, choose the first among the optimal coordinates. a(n) is the zero-based index of the coordinate that is increased in the n-th step.
